title: nasturtium laciniatum
intro: Nasturtium laciniatum, also known as the cress or garden cress, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It is a member of the Brassicaceae family, which includes other plants like broccoli, cauliflower, and mustard. The medicinal properties of Nasturtium laciniatum include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as tea, tinctures, and salves, and is said to have health benefits including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system.
